_comment: SHARED bridge<->app contract for the model-badge v2 structured provenance. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the exact badge strings, the citations-unverified warning, and the assembled reply text per route. BOTH the Rust bridge test (bridge/src/badge.rs) AND the iOS app test (Jesse/JesseTests/ProvenanceFixtureTests.swift) load THIS FILE from disk (the Swift test resolves it relative to #filePath) and assert against it, so the two sides can never drift. Edit here and both suites re-verify. `·` is U+00B7; the warning starts with U+26A0 U+FE0F.
